description:
You are a mission operations planner for the EarthWatch-3 polar-orbiting Earth observation satellite. Determine the communication contact windows for the 48-hour Initial Orbit Checkout (IOC) phase using NASA's Near-Earth Network (NEN) based on the mission requirements in ~/Desktop/earthwatch3_comms_plan.txt. Create a GMAT script defining the spacecraft and GroundStation objects for Svalbard, Poker Flat, and McMurdo (using a 5-degree MinimumElevationAngle) to perform a 48-hour contact analysis from the spacecraft epoch. Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/contact_analysis.script and write a summary report to ~/GMAT_output/contact_analysis.txt. The report must identify the 'Best_station' (the one providing the maximum total contact minutes) and follow this exact format:

Svalbard_passes: <integer>
Svalbard_minutes: <float>
Svalbard_max_elev: <float>
PokerFlat_passes: <integer>
PokerFlat_minutes: <float>
PokerFlat_max_elev: <float>
McMurdo_passes: <integer>
McMurdo_minutes: <float>
McMurdo_max_elev: <float>
Best_station: <Svalbard or McMurdo or PokerFlat>

Login: username=ga, password=password123
